name: Film and Digital Media: Production Track

courses.title: Producing for Film and Digital Media

fdm-production.label: Production Electives
fdm-production.note: Two production courses from: cinematography, directing, screenwriting, documentary, post-production

fdm-media-studies.label: Media Studies Electives
fdm-media-studies.note: Two courses: one from COMM 203/324 (cinema history/genre), one from broader film/media list

fdm-advanced.label: Advanced Production
fdm-advanced.note: COMM 336 (Cinematography I), COMM 337 (Screen Directing), COMM 339 (Screenwriting I), or similar

fdm-internship.label: Internship
fdm-internship.note: COMM 394: Film and Digital Media Internship (Junior/Senior standing required)

fdm-capstone.label: Capstone
fdm-capstone.note: COMM 338, COMM 339, or COMM 388 (Film and Digital Media Capstone)
